title: Pisellini COBBLEMON
description: OFFICIAL modpack to play on FariVII’s Cobblemon Server, Twitch Streamer
body:
## 🌟 Description

The idea behind this project comes from the desire to create something more than just a server:  
a true **_complete Cobblemon experience_**, designed for those who love Pokémon and want to experience them together with other players.

This modpack has been designed to work **_perfectly_** with our server, offering a stable, polished, and content-rich environment.  
It’s not just a collection of mods, but an ecosystem built around **_gameplay, progression, and community_**.

---

## 🎮 What You’ll Find

✨ A world where every player can build their own journey  
⚔️ **Ranked System** with competitive progression  
🎣 Unique events and custom activities  
🏆 Balanced economic system  
🌍 Maps, warps, and zones designed for an immersive experience  

Everything is designed to create **_real interactions between players_**, making every session different from the last.

---

## 🚀 A Constantly Evolving Project

The server is in continuous development:  
new features, custom systems, and content are added regularly.

From **mods created specifically** for the server to the best community-made mods,  
the goal is to deliver an experience that is **_increasingly complete and unique_**.

---

## 🇮🇹 A New Cobblemon Hub in Italy

We believe that Italy lacks a true reference point for Cobblemon.  
That’s why we are building something that goes beyond the classic server:

👉 **_a strong community_**  
👉 **_deep gameplay_**  
👉 **_an experience that lasts over time_**

We will give it our all to create  
**_something never seen before in Italy_**.

---

## ❤️ Who Is This Modpack For?

✔️ For those who love Pokémon  
✔️ For those looking for an active and well-maintained server  
✔️ For those who want to compete, explore, and collect  
✔️ For those who want to be part of a **real community**
